title: Kanban Plan — ct-cognize shell API for multi-agent runs
description: Extend isolated ct-cognize CLI to run with different AI agents from shell and document in --help.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Make ct-cognize shell-friendly for explicit single/multi-agent execution

DONE.task: Implement ct-cognize CLI options for explicit agent list/order and agent discovery output
DONE.notes: Added --agents, --list-agents, dynamic agent registry, shell examples in help

DONE.task: Update manifest and tests for new CLI/help behavior
DONE.notes: Updated MANIFEST usage/flags/examples and ct-cognize tests

DONE.task: Run isolated ct-cognize tests and shell smoke runs with different agents

acceptance_criteria: ct-cognize supports explicit shell-driven multi-agent order

tests pass and isolated CLI runs succeed
